Video.summary: Paying tribute to the beauty of theater.
Video.title: Spotlight on Varakai

Video.summary: Journey through the captivating spectacle that has enraptured audiences worldwide; from its dazzling acrobatics to its poignant storytelling, Alegria embodies the essence of its name, spreading joy wherever it goes.
Video.title: Alegria

Video.summary: Diving into the '80s magic with Cirque du Soleil's second show; unveiling the enchanting performances that defined La Magie Continue, shaping the legacy we adore today.
Video.title: La Magie Continue

Video.summary: Featuring some of the most nail-biting acts from Cirque du Soleil artists.
Video.title: Best of Adrenaline - Part 1

Video.summary: How do they catch marshmallows? Make paint fly?; go behind the scenes and find out!
Video.title: Creative Chaos Part 2

Video.summary: The first Christmas show "'Twas the Night Before."
Video.title: Spotlight on 'Twas the Night Before...

Video.summary: Two artists, one stunning connection. Experience Cirque du Soleil's seamless coordination with the best duo acts. Spectacular acrobatics, immersive artistry, and unique athleticism unite in Gravity Defied: Cirque du Soleil!
Video.title: Unbreakable Bonds in Duo Acts

Video.summary: Spectacular acrobatics, immersive artistry, and unique athleticism unite in Gravity Defied: Cirque du Soleil!
Video.title: Mastery of Motion

Video.summary: No makeup, no costumes: just raw talent. Cirque RAW offers an unfiltered view of the circus arts.
Video.title: Cirque Raw

Video.summary: The funniest audience moments of Cirque du Soleil guests! Playful moments, bringing heart and humor on-stage.
Video.title: Funniest Audience Moments

Video.summary: We're embedding you with Cirque du Soleil performers right before showtime!
Video.title: Showtime

Video.summary: Watch in real time as this Cirque du Soleil duo trains for 'Twas the Night Before… at the Montreal headquarters!
Video.grandparentTitle: Slow TV: Watch Cirque du Soleil Artists Training
Video.title: TWAS The Night Before... Aerial Duo Straps

TWAS The Night Before... Aerial Duo Straps
TWAS The Night Before... Aerial Duo Straps

Video.summary: Explore the Blue Man Group doc series, BTS training, unique instruments, and relaxing ASMR musical beats.
Video.title: Blue Man Group: Creative Chaos - Part 1

Image.alt: Blue Man Group: Creative Chaos - Part 1
Blue Man Group: Creative Chaos - Part 1
Blue Man Group: Creative Chaos - Part 1
Blue Man Group: Creative Chaos - Part 1
Blue Man Group: Creative Chaos - Part 1

Video.summary: Cirque du Soleil's Delirium blends live music, striking visuals, and acrobatics in a one-of-a-kind spectacle.
Video.title: Delirium

Video.summary: Get ready to be captivated by the ultimate Encore Echoes. Three iconic acts, one binge-worthy compilation.
Video.title: Encore Echoes

Video.summary: Refresh the spirit with mood boosting acts, filled with energy; a good way to lift the mood.
Video.title: Mood Boosting Acts

Video.summary: The full production of Volta, recorded live.
Video.title: Cirque du Soleil Presents: Volta

Video.summary: A new version of Alegria.
Video.title: Alegria: A Wind of Change

Video.summary: The full production of O, recorded live!
Video.title: Cirque Du Soleil Presents: O

Video.summary: An annual collaboration from Cirque du Soleil and MGM Resorts, with never before seen acts!
Video.title: One Night for One Drop

Video.summary: The full production of Corteo, recorded live.
Video.title: Cirque du Soleil Presents: Corteo

Video.summary: Workout alongside the Cirque du Soleil artists.
Video.title: Varekai & Quidam

Video.summary: Documentary about the show on ice Crystal.
Video.title: Crystal - Gliding Higher

Video.summary: Celebrating the classic shows you know and love, including three of the first shows that performed under our Grand Chapiteau.
Video.title: Saltimbanco, Nouvelle Experience, Cirque Reinvente

Video.summary: Behind the curtain of Mystčre.
Video.title: Mystere: The Mystery of Mystere

Video.summary: A look at the best live show moments of "O"; the performers share their experience and emotions at that quintessential moment of an act.
Video.title: O - Flow

Video.summary: Join us as we take you on a three-destination trip: first Luzia, then Bazaar, with a final stop at Kurios!
Video.grandparentTitle: Luzia, Bazzar, Kurios -- Cabinet of Curiosities
Video.title: Luzia, Bazzar, Kurios -- Cabinet of Curiosities
